name: Macedonian Standard (Beasty)
author: lyvant
reasoning: Beasty's Macedonian order, the reference build for the civ's hybrid economy and Riddari power spike.

notes: At spawn, 5 villager on sheep | 1 villager repair varangian warcamp , rally point villager on gold until 2 then rally point on food until age 2

Go age 2 with 4 villager from food then back to food ( imperial hippodrome 1 )| Send 2 villager from food to wood until 6 then rally point food | repair house | repair outpost to gold when possible on 4:00 min

As soon as 2nd horseman 1 is queued, send 5 villager from food to stone until 50 stone then food when 150 wood , 3 villager from wood to gold and 3 villager to food Once 50 stone , upgrade arrow slits YOU NEED 290 wood for 2 horsemen/warcamp/2 house /tower
Once varangian arsenal done, get scale barding 2 ASAP | Keep rally point villager on food
When close to enough gold to age 3 (around 450 gold ), move 5 villager from food to gold
Age up to age 3 ASAP, send 8) villager repair golden horn tower 2 around ressources like gold , deer or berries

Once age 3 , just chilling, Macro villager to gold and wood + rally point on food Get the military upgrades and the eco upgrades ASAP specialized pick double broadaxe survival techniques horticulture Start to produce riddari 3 with imperial hippodrome 1 | Set varangian warcamp on riddari 3 Build monastery ASAP and go get relics (protect relics with riddari 3 if needed) Later on you can add stable varangian stronghold to produce more riddari 3
